## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Quipteams to discuss potential AI-driven content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Quipteams seeks to improve AI visibility and content strategy in a competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive AI-powered content creation, optimization, and visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by potential long-term engagement ($9k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI tools, expert editors, and high-volume quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Topics

### Quipteams' Current Situation and Challenges

  - [Small team (50 headcount) in a new category with \~10 competitors](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Strong organic growth (2-3 meetings/week) but low awareness compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - 25%+ of competitors' traffic coming from AI platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity) vs. \<1% for Quipteams
  - [Previous blog content in Spanish; needs English content aligned with new ICP (350+ big companies in 130 countries)](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### GrowthX's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows, expert editors, and high-volume quality content](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Focus on both search visibility and AI answer inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Comprehensive strategy: topic clusters, content creation, optimization, and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Examples shared: Ramp (financial content), Augment Code (AI coding tools), Tiro (healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20,000): Content strategy, workflow customization, opportunity mapping](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Long-term engagement ($9,000/month): Daily content publication, ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Full-service approach: Content creation, SEO, design, CMS management, weekly reporting](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Team includes managing editor, managing director, content managers, and SEO expert](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### AI Visibility and Content Strategy

  - [Importance of showing up in AI answers for various use cases and queries](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Focus on creating trust-building, credible content that aligns with audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Strategies for competing against larger players through high-quality, high-volume content](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

### Potential Collaboration Considerations

  - [David (Quipteams) to evaluate the recurring engagement after the initial strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [GrowthX typically has a 6-week lead time due to dedicated team preparation](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Discussion on adapting strategy for smaller companies with limited internal resources](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to add David to a shared Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Tyler to send sample SLW (Statement of Work) and available kickoff dates](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [David to review the proposal and consider the long-term engagement potential](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Potential follow-up deep dive meeting if needed](https://fathom.video/share/_xED8SuG7Jx8LMYxYM_8L5EZTvB31jPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
